message:
feat(evidence): integrate EvidenceLedger schema for runtime decision tracing (bd-1e2if.3)

Add EvidenceSink trait with NullSink, JsonlSink, and CollectorSink backends.
Wire through Cx and scheduler to emit evidence at cancellation checkpoints
and governor lane-selection decisions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
